name: timeplanner
description: This repository is being organized as a small monorepo for the static time planner app and the 2026 notes archive that will later feed it.

scripts.generate: node scripts/index-notes.js && node scripts/generate-roadmap.js && node scripts/generate-roadmap-levels.js && node scripts/assign-notes-to-levels.js && node scripts/extract-tasks-from-notes.js && node scripts/generate-project-states.js && node scripts/generate-milestones.js && node scripts/generate-dashboard-model.js && node scripts/generate-ai-suggestions.js
